title: Reforgium
description: Unofficial Fork of FRAPI and Indium that works with Forge
body:
# Reforgium

Reforgium is an unofficial fork of the Fabric Rendering API and Indium, designed to facilitate easier porting of client-side mods. The mod includes two types of rendering: Indigo and ReforgiumRenderer (Indium).

ReforgiumRenderer is activated when Rubidium is present in the modpack, otherwise Indigo is used.

## Mods that use Reforgium

- Connectedness

*Note: Reforgium is not affiliated with Fabric or Indium.*
